headline: Stanley Black & Decker Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE:SWK) reported what CEO Chris Nelson described as a “solid start to the year,” with first-quarter results coming in ahead of the company’s expectations on both revenue and earnings.
